title: FAMILY CAREGIVER HELPLINES - 211info
text: NATIONAL ALLIANCE ON MENTAL ILLNESS OF OREGON FAMILY CAREGIVER HELPLINES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a confidential caregiver helpline service providing caregiver-led support, tools and strategies, guidance, and connection to resources. 147 SE 102nd Avenue Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-7pm Email (800) 950-6264 4 .. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (800) 950-6264 ext 4 [email protected] . Text Short Code 62640 Email Address: [email protected] . INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Caregiver Counseling Talklines/Warmlines * Caregiver Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: INFORMATION SERVICES - NAMI OREGON If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NATIONAL ALLIANCE ON MENTAL ILLNESS OF OREGON
